transportedTraceSpace.name: X_R

quotientSchurInputStatus.label: normalized quotient Schur input

quotientFactorizationInputStatus.label: quotient factorization input
quotientFactorizationInputStatus.reason: The quotient theorem gives Q_Phi=||G_q f||^2-||S Rf||^2.

traceSideRepairInputStatus.label: bounded trace-side repair input

minimalRepairInputStatus.label: Moore-Penrose minimal repair input
minimalRepairInputStatus.reason: The quotient theorem identifies the singular Moore-Penrose Schur repair.

minimalRepairConsequenceStatus.label: minimal repair consequence
minimalRepairConsequenceStatus.reason: The imported quotient facts define D_q=(Gamma^*Gamma-C)_+ as a bounded repair on X_R.

operator.name: D_q
operator.claim: bounded minimal trace repair for the fixed quotient positive part

proof: Expose only the factorization and bounded minimal-repair consequences.
